name: Salata Laktuka - Polish Wilted Leaf Lettuce S
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the leaf lettuce thoroughly and dry it.
2. Cut the lettuce coarsely.
3. In a bowl, mix together shallots or onions, sugar, salt, and pepper.
4. Fry the bacon slices until golden brown. Once done, dice them.
5. Add the diced bacon to the lettuce mixture.
6. In 2 tablespoons of hot bacon fat, add vinegar and water. Bring to a boil.
7. Pour the boiling liquid over the lettuce and mix well.
8. Serve and enjoy.
